title: What Is an LLM? The Clearest Explanation for Builders
target_reader: Beginners, software engineers, builders, and non-researchers who want a practical mental model of large language models.
meta_title: What Is an LLM? The Clearest Explanation for Builders
meta_description: A practical, beginner-friendly explanation of large language models covering tokens, training, next-token prediction, context, hallucinations, and simple code examples.
linkedin_post_angle: Most people explain LLMs like they are trying to win a jargon marathon. Here is the practical version: tokens in, probabilities out, useful workflows around it.
